testcase.failure:
@pytest.mark.asyncio @mock.patch("builtins.open", mock.mock_open(read_data=ACCESS_TOKEN_YAML)) async def test_init_via_yaml(): """This function tests when the class is initiated via yaml file.""" > qtrade = Questrade(token_yaml="access_token.yml") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: __init__() should return None, not 'coroutine'
